niche.positioning: Practical tools and checklists for matching apartment window light to houseplant placement.
why: Long-tail search demand around window direction, low light, and apartment plant placement.
Low legal, financial, medical, and safety risk.
Original utility can be built with calculators, decision trees, diagrams, and measured datasets.
Traffic can plausibly arrive from specific queries within 30 days.
